description: Fail-loud: chronon3d_cli render must abort loudly when an audio asset path does not exist on disk. Per user-spec verbatim 'audio inesistente', this fixture extends the Test #7 fail-loud contract to the AUDIO-load stage. Canonical error vocabulary: Composition/Layer/Asset/Path tokens in stderr + AudioDecoder-specific context, NO silent fallback markers, exit code != 0, output MP4 absent, error message MUST mention the asset name + the owner layer name (per user-spec 'errore che indica asset+owner/layer').
honesty_note: Per AGENTS.md §honesty: the missing-audio path is GUARANTEED not to exist (path is named '..._harness_should_not_exist'); the CLI must fail-loud at the AUDIO-load stage with the canonical error vocabulary + the missing asset name + the owner layer name. Per AGENTS.md Cat-3 anti-duplication: this JSON schema is shared across all 5 Test #7 + 6 NEW asset preflight fixtures, with the rot_class + AudioDecoder-specific token differing per fixture — no duplicate schema files.
